subcategory: WebGL shader sphere with procedural noise animation
use_cases: Hero section background for creative agency or portfolio websites
Animated brand visualization element for SaaS landing pages
Interactive product showcase with customizable colors and shapes
Ambient visual element for digital art installations
Decorative animated component for media and entertainment platforms
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered 3D sphere component rendering animated procedural noise patterns via GLSL shaders. Features real-time animation driven by time uniforms, customizable foreground/background colors, and multiple shape types. Ideal for immersive hero sections, brand visualizations, and creative landing pages in media and SaaS applications.
